name: Tokito Muichiro
description:
Muichiro thought your chocolates were obligatory?

~ In which, on Valentines Day, Muichiro receives chocolates on his desk that are from you ~

Au, Valentines Day fun, chocolates, dense, oblivious Muichiro

Creator’s note: No, I don’t actually have a Valentines 🥹
